basic_details.job_title: RCFL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 46 Honorary Doctors, Panel Doctors Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (Navratna PSU)
basic_details.total_vacancies: Honorary Doctors (31 posts); Panel Doctors (15 posts)
basic_details.short_information: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCF Ltd.), a Navratna Company and Government of India Undertaking, has invited applications from doctors for two separate engagements at its Trombay Unit, Chembur, Mumbai: Honorary Doctors (31 posts across 19 specialties) for its in-house hospital, and Panel Doctors (15 posts) across ten localities in Navi Mumbai and Thane. This article covers complete details on eligibility, vacancies, application format, and how to apply.

important_dates.raw: Last date for receipt of application: 31 July 2026 Tenure of Honorary Doctors' engagement: 01/01/2027 to 31/12/2029 Tenure of Panel Doctors' engagement: 3 years (start date not specified in the notification)

qualification.details: Qualification and minimum experience required vary by specialty - see the specialty-wise table above. Broadly, candidates need a postgraduate medical qualification (MD/MS/DNB or equivalent) relevant to the specialty, along with 5 years of experience after post-graduation (15 years after graduation for Physiotherapists; specific cardiac/nephrology/urology centre attachment experience required for Cardiologist, Nephrologist, and Urologist posts). | Must be a registered Medical Practitioner with an MBBS degree. Minimum 10 years of experience, excluding internship period. Must have their own dispensary/clinic in the relevant panel area, with full OPD facilities and an online computer system. Clinic must be equipped to conduct routine immunization and minor surgical procedures.

vacancy_details.Minimum Experience Required: 5 years' experience with attachment to a Cardiac Hospital with Cath. Lab facilities
5 years' experience with attachment to a specialized centre
5 years' experience with attachment to a specialized centre

post_wise_breakdown.minimum_experience_required: 5 years' experience with attachment to a Cardiac Hospital with Cath. Lab facilities
5 years' experience with attachment to a specialized centre
5 years' experience with attachment to a specialized centre

salary_details.details: The notification does not specify the honorarium amount, visit frequency-based payment, or per-patient reimbursement rates in advance. For Honorary Doctors, the honorarium and duration/frequency of visits will be conveyed by the Selection Committee at the time of the personal interview. For Panel Doctors, the rates of reimbursement per patient will similarly be conveyed at the interview stage.

selection_process: Selection is through a personal interview; eligible candidates will be intimated in writing about the date

and venue. No written examination is mentioned in the notification. No communication (written or telephonic) will be entertained after the closing date of application submission. Management reserves the right to consider applications from doctors with less experience than advertised

if the number of applications received is fewer than three times the number of advertised posts. Management reserves the right to modify the number of posts. The company's decision on engagement will be final; no correspondence on the decision will be entertained.
how_to_apply: Download or prepare the application in the prescribed format for the specific post - Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors require separate applications.
Fill in personal details, qualification details, registration details, and experience details as applicable.
Affix a duly signed passport-size photograph, and mention the specialty applied for.
Attach attested photocopies of educational qualification and experience certificates.
Write the name of the post applied for on the top left-hand corner of the envelope.

Send the completed application by post to: Deputy General Manager (HR) – Unit, Human Resource Department (Trombay Unit), First Floor, Room No. 117-A, Administrative Building, Chembur, Mumbai – 400074, so as to reach on or before 31 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: RCF Ltd Doctors Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.details: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (Navratna PSU)
Honorary Doctors (31 posts); Panel Doctors (15 posts)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Last date for receipt of application: 31 July 2026 Tenure of Honorary Doctors' engagement: 01/01/2027 to 31/12/2029 Tenure of Panel Doctors' engagement: 3 years (start date not specified in the notification)

content_sections.heading: RCF Ltd Honorary Doctors: Specialty-wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The actual number of visits assigned per doctor will be decided based on response received and doctor availability.

rows.minimum_experience_required: 5 years' experience with attachment to a Cardiac Hospital with Cath. Lab facilities

5 years' experience with attachment to a specialized centre

content_sections.heading: RCF Ltd Panel Doctors: Locality-wise Vacancy Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification and minimum experience required vary by specialty - see the specialty-wise table above. Broadly, candidates need a postgraduate medical qualification (MD/MS/DNB or equivalent) relevant to the specialty, along with 5 years of experience after post-graduation (15 years after graduation for Physiotherapists; specific cardiac/nephrology/urology centre attachment experience required for Cardiologist, Nephrologist, and Urologist posts). Must be a registered Medical Practitioner with an MBBS degree. Minimum 10 years of experience, excluding internship period. Must have their own dispensary/clinic in the relevant panel area, with full OPD facilities and an online computer system. Clinic must be equipped to conduct routine immunization and minor surgical procedures.

content_sections.heading: Honorarium / Remuneration
content_sections.text: The notification does not specify the honorarium amount, visit frequency-based payment, or per-patient reimbursement rates in advance. For Honorary Doctors, the honorarium and duration/frequency of visits will be conveyed by the Selection Committee at the time of the personal interview. For Panel Doctors, the rates of reimbursement per patient will similarly be conveyed at the interview stage.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is through a personal interview; eligible candidates will be intimated in writing about the date, time, and venue. No written examination is mentioned in the notification. No communication (written or telephonic) will be entertained after the closing date of application submission. Management reserves the right to consider applications from doctors with less experience than advertised, if the number of applications received is fewer than three times the number of advertised posts. Management reserves the right to modify the number of posts. The company's decision on engagement will be final; no correspondence on the decision will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly filled application in the prescribed format (separate formats for Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors) Recent passport-size photograph, duly signed and affixed on the application Attested photocopies of educational qualification certificates Attested photocopies of experience certificates Medical Council registration details (number, date, state, and council) Details of research papers/articles published, if any (for Honorary Doctors) For Panel Doctors: details of clinic/dispensary address, timings, facilities, equipment, average daily patients, and prior empanelment details, if any

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Download or prepare the application in the prescribed format for the specific post - Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors require separate applications . Fill in personal details, qualification details, registration details, and experience details as applicable. Affix a duly signed passport-size photograph, and mention the specialty applied for. Attach attested photocopies of educational qualification and experience certificates. Write the name of the post applied for on the top left-hand corner of the envelope. Send the completed application by post to: Deputy General Manager (HR) – Unit, Human Resource Department (Trombay Unit), First Floor, Room No. 117-A, Administrative Building, Chembur, Mumbai – 400074, so as to reach on or before 31 July 2026 .

Those interested in Navratna and Maharatna company openings can check more RCF Ltd Recruitment and Central PSU Jobs listings, while doctors seeking panel/empanelment opportunities can browse Panel Doctor Jobs in Mumbai matching their qualification.

faq.question: Q1. How many total vacancies are there in RCF Ltd's Honorary and Panel Doctors recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 46 vacancies in total - 31 Honorary Doctor posts across 19 specialties, and 15 Panel Doctor posts across 10 localities in Navi Mumbai and Thane.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RCF Ltd Doctors Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application by post is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format by post to the Deputy General Manager (HR) – Unit at the Trombay Unit address in Chembur, Mumbai.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Panel Doctors at RCF Ltd?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a registered Medical Practitioner with an MBBS degree, have a minimum of 10 years' experience (excluding internship), and own a dispensary/clinic with full OPD facilities and an online computer system in one of the listed panel areas.

faq.question: Q5. What is the honorarium for Honorary Doctors at RCF Ltd?
faq.answer: Not specified in the notification. The honorarium and visit frequency will be conveyed by the Selection Committee at the time of the personal interview.

faq.question: Q6. Can I apply for both Honorary Doctor and Panel Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Yes, but separate applications must be sent for each post, with the post name clearly written on the top left-hand corner of the envelope.
